discrepancies.implication: No paper matching the spec target exists. Both identifiers reproducibly point to unrelated 2010 publications. The spec target is not retrievable.
audit_routes_attempted: Peter Forrester arXiv author listing https://arxiv.org/a/forrester_p_1.html (~89 papers; no PIII' tau function 2010 J Phys A 43 235202 entry)
Nicholas Witte arXiv author listing https://arxiv.org/a/witte_n_1.html (~51 papers; no matching 2009-2010 J Phys A submission)
discrepancies.remediation_taken: Re-targeted to closest thematic substitute arXiv:math/0512142 (Forrester-Witte 2005, the only Forrester-Witte arXiv paper with 'Painleve III'' in the title). Phase D readback executed against substitute.
